name: Chocnut Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 cup roasted hazelnuts (about 10 minutes in a hot oven)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the roasted hazelnuts in a blender until finely ground.
2. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler, stirring occasionally until smooth.
3. Mix the melted chocolate with the ground hazelnuts until well combined.
4. Serve with toast or use as a filling for making your own chocolates.
5. If the pate is too stiff, add a little cream to achieve desired consistency.
